message:
chore(deps): add frankensqlite workspace crate path overrides for mvcc, btree, ast, parser, planner, vdbe, and func

Extends the [patch.crates-io] section with local path overrides for
seven additional fsqlite crates so that all frankensqlite dependencies
resolve to the local workspace during development.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
